message:
chore(beads): add 4 epics and 19 sub-tasks for key dispatch, robot validation, snapshot immutability, and cache stampede prevention

Planning decomposition for the next phase of beads_viewer development, covering
four architectural improvement areas:

1. Key Dispatch Architecture — Formal Focus-State Machine (bv-msve):
   Define per-view key registries, implement two-phase dispatch with
   focus-first/handled-bool fallback, restore sacrificed key bindings
   (board gg-combo, tree g-jump), and auto-generate context-sensitive help.

2. Robot Flag Validation — Declarative Command Registry (bv-0i5i):
   Define RobotCommand registry type with validation metadata, add upfront
   modifier flag validation, and migrate existing handlers to registry-based
   dispatch.

3. Snapshot Immutability — Copy-on-Phase2 Protocol (bv-jwq6):
   Compile-time immutability enforcement via unexported snapshot fields,
   SnapshotWithPhase2 constructor, eliminate shared backing arrays between
   pool and snapshot, replace in-place Phase2 mutations with snapshot swap.

4. Cache Stampede Prevention — Probabilistic Early Expiration (bv-mdv6):
   Add singleflight to CachedCorrelator.GenerateReport and MetricsCache,
   XFetch probabilistic early refresh for robotDiskCache, atomic hash-and-load
   for MetricsCache.Refresh.

Also adds tree-state.json (default UI state for beads tree view).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
